title: Magnetic Wrist Sewing, Portable Arm Pin Cushion Magnetic Pincushion with Wristband for Sewing Collection(Pink)

Sewing Time Saver: Great item for not only sewing pins but screws, nails, and small bits that you need to keep nearby while performing a task.
Detachable Design: Our magnetic wrist sewing pincushion design with detachable, it is easier to clean and carry.
Packing List: The package includes a magnetic wrist sewing pincushion. If you have any questions, we hope you contact us first, and we will solve your problem within 24 HOURS.
